Setlist
Shows With at Least One Officially-Released Song: 2010 - 2019
The shows on this list have had at least one song officially released.

Some shows have had multiple songs released on different compilations (e.g., 5.26.12's Beach Ball was released on the Warehouse 10 Vol. 11 compilation, while the Little Red Bird from the same show was released as a bonus track on Away From the World). In cases such as this, we have listed one of the appearances in the "Release Name" column and any other releases with unique songs in the "Additional Release(s)" column.

1991â1999
2000â2009
2010â2019
2020âpresent
